texto: We cannot safely assume that other people's minds work on the same principles as our own. All too often others with whom we come in contact do not reason as we reason or do not value the things we value or are not interested in what interests us.
explicacao: Citação de Isabel Briggs Myers sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We cannot safely assume that other people's minds work on the same principles as our own. All too…” articula reflexao, helping, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e people.
